output d{25, 25, 30, 30, 30, 30, 35, 35, 35, 35, 35, 35, 40, 40, 40, 40, 40, 40, 40, 40, 50, 50, 50, 50, 50, 50, 50, 50, 50, 50}+d{15, 25, 30, 35, 40, 50}

output d{25, 25, 30, 30, 30, 30, 35, 35, 35, 35, 35, 35, 40, 40, 40, 40, 40, 40, 40, 40, 50, 50, 50, 50, 50, 50, 50, 50, 50, 50}+2d{15, 25, 30, 35, 40, 50}

output d{25, 25, 30, 30, 30, 30, 35, 35, 35, 35, 35, 35, 40, 40, 40, 40, 40, 40, 40, 40, 50, 50, 50, 50, 50, 50, 50, 50, 50, 50}+3d{15, 25, 30, 35, 40, 50}
